nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Huallaga tanager
nodes.summary: Huallaga tanager（Ramphocelus melanogaster）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Huallaga tanager。

nodes.name: Huallaga tanager
nodes.summary: The Huallaga tanager (Ramphocelus melanogaster) or black-bellied tanager, is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is endemic to Peru. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and heavily degraded former forest. References
